creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 218390
[log] net/samba411 make configure

On a 32-bit host (running 11/stable), I get am getting samba411 hanging (forever) during configure - stuck on 'usem':

  PID USERNAME       THR PRI NICE   SIZE    RES STATE   C   TIME    WCPU COMMAND
16969 jdoe           563  52    0   165M 91504K usem    0   0:28   0.00% python3.7


Log attached (with one ctrl-t while hung).  Looking for things to try / diagnose.  I tried instrumenting waf with prints, but it got too deep quickly to be of any use - maybe if I knew waf better, I could figure out exactly where is the right location for some helpful debug.
